pkgmetadata.longdescription: A translation from the Carneades argumentation model (http://hackage.haskell.org/package/CarneadesDSL) into Dung's argumentation frameworks (http://hackage.haskell.org/package/Dung). This package provides a translation function and correspondence properties. See "Towards a framework for the implementation and verification of translations between argumentation models" by Bas van Gijzel and Henrik Nilsson or the package's homepage.
